title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.170 - Journal to be kept
text:
172.170.  Journal to be kept. — The secretary shall keep a journal of the proceedings of the curators, in which the ayes and noes on all questions shall be entered, if requested by any one of the curators present.
(RSMo 1939 § 10802) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9645; 1919 § 11542; 1909 § 11116
